title: Verify replay and overlap safety
preconditions: Fixtures cover renamed exact replay, identical tuples at different positions, proven exact identity, uncertain overlap, and identity reuse with changed facts.
steps: Preview each fixture against prior batch and canonical provenance and observe duplicate, candidate, replay, and conflict outcomes.
expected: Every acceptance criterion of FR-INGEST-REPLAY-OVERLAP-SAFETY holds; exact replay has no new effect, tuple collisions remain distinct, and uncertain overlap blocks.
